title: Hardcoded API key in source code
description: A secret API key is hardcoded on line 5. This credential will be committed to version control and exposed to anyone with repository access. This is a critical security vulnerability.
suggestion: Move the API key to an environment variable: const API_KEY = process.env.API_KEY; and add validation to ensure it is set at startup.

title: SQL injection via string interpolation
description: The searchUsers function constructs a SQL query using template literal string interpolation with unsanitised user input. An attacker can inject arbitrary SQL by providing a crafted query parameter.
suggestion: Use parameterised queries instead: db.query('SELECT * FROM users WHERE name LIKE $1', [`%${query}%`])
